allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/slides/parse -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"markdown": "# Slide One\\n\\nHello world.\\n\\n---\\n\\n# Slide Two\\n\\n- Point A\\n- Point B"}')

Bash(curl -s -o /tmp/test.pdf -D /tmp/headers.txt -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/export -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"markdown": "# Slide One\\n\\nHello world.\\n\\n---\\n\\n# Slide Two\\n\\n- Point A\\n- Point B", "theme": "modern", "format": "pdf"}')
